facts.claim: Master the art of cruise ship fun onboard Carnival Splendor - the newest and biggest ship in our fleet. Explore cruise ships departing Sydney at Carnival!
Just like a delicious cake, your ship is made of layers. Find out which fun ingredients — staterooms, dining, activities — go into each deck.
Carnival Splendor is a Concordia-class cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
As she is the only Concordia-class ship in the Carnival fleet, she is also referred to as a Splendor-class ship.
The ship was originally designed and ordered for Costa Cruises but she was transferred to Carnival Cruise Line during construction.
